steps: Given user is on dashboard|When user clicks on Background Checks menu|Then Background Check page should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to Background Check page

steps: Given user is on Background Check page|When user clicks on New Manual Order button|Then Manual Order step-1 page should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to Manual Order step-1

steps: Given user is on Manual Order step-1 page|When user selects Background Check package|And user clicks Next button|Then Step-2 form should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to Step-2 form

steps: Given user is on Step-2 form page|When user enters first name as Nidhi|And user enters last name|And user fills required details|And user clicks Next button|Then Step-3 page should be displayed
Given user is on Step-3 page|When user verifies details entered in Step-2|And user confirms information|And user clicks Next button|Then Step-4 review page should be displayed
expected_result: User is redirected to Step-4 review

steps: Given user is on Step-4 review page|When user verifies all entered details|And user confirms agreement|And user clicks Submit button|Then order submission should be successful
Given order is successfully submitted|When user clicks Done button|Then user should be redirected to Background Check dashboard
expected_result: User lands on Background Check dashboard
